name: Deferred - Rival - 2
description: Second returns for old rivals from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [social -1] The rival from {origin} finally outmaneuvered you where others could see it.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [money -30] Competition from {origin} cost you profit, place, or favor that might otherwise have been yours.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [social 1] The rivalry from {origin} ended with your adversary overreaching and you looking wiser by comparison.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [contact] The old rival from {origin} became a reluctant equal once both of you discovered the contest had matured past vanity.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] A rivalry from {origin} damaged your peace more than your actual station.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [social -1] Your rival from {origin} did not defeat you, but did make your path narrower.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [contact] What began as rivalry in {origin} ended in wary respect and a connection neither of you would name friendship.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [money -20] The contest from {origin} cost you one opening that never returned.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [social 1] Your rival from {origin} helped make your eventual success look all the more decisive.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The rivalry from {origin} sharpened you enough that its annoyance was not entirely wasted.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [social -1] The old competitor from {origin} stayed just close enough to be a nuisance and just distant enough to be hard to answer.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [contact] Your rival from {origin} became one of those people whose opposition is almost a kind of alliance.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [money -40] The old contest from {origin} finally exacted its cost in lost work rather than bruised pride.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [social 1] The rivalry from {origin} ended with your adversary proving your worth more effectively than a friend might have.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] The rival from {origin} never vanished entirely; they merely became part of the weather around your name.
results.name: rival-2

results.description: [contact] What had begun in {origin} as rivalry became a durable and exasperating relationship that both of you somehow preserved.
